     The Numbers Business Report

Saw X (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,607,898Details
International Box Office $71,701,964
Worldwide Box Office $125,309,862
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,479,663
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,561,519
Total $4,041,182
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A sick and desperate John Kramer travels to Mexico for a risky and experimental medical procedure in hopes of a miracle cure for his cancer—only to discover the entire operation is a scam to defraud the most vulnerable. Armed with a newfound purpose, the infamous serial killer returns to his work, turning the tables on the con artists in his signature visceral way through devious, deranged, and ingenious traps.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,309,301 (34.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,262 opening theaters/3,262 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,606,069

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Greece)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Guatemala)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Taiwan)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Thailand)
Video Release: October 20th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of grisly bloody violence and torture, language and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2798 (cert #54537), 8/30/2023)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Saw
Cast, crew, or production detail: Inbetwequel
Filming location (country): Mexico
Plot point: Torture Porn
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Twisted Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
